items.label: Introduction
items.content:
# ZYNQ Games

ZYNQ.games is a client-side game library engine.

It loads a remote dataset, transforms it into a structured collection, and provides a full API to search, filter, sort and manage games.

Everything runs locally after initialization.

No backend required.

items.label: Installation
items.content:
# Installation

## Script
```html
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@1.1.4/index.min.js"></script>
```

## Usage
```js
await ZYNQ.games.init()
```

After init:
```js
ZYNQ.games.list
ZYNQ.games.total
```

items.label: init()
items.content:
## init(options?)
Initializes engine, loads data and prepares state.

### JS
```js
await ZYNQ.games.init({
  mode: "supported",
  search: "blo",
  sort: "name"
})
```

### Returns
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

items.label: Game Object
items.content:
## Game Object

Every game follows this structure:

```ts
{
  name: string,
  alias: string,
  url: string,
  thumb: string,
  category?: string,
  devices: number[],
  isSupported: boolean,
  isFavorite: boolean
}
```

children.label: search()
children.content:
## search(query)

### JS
```js
ZYNQ.games.search("blo")
```

### Returns
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

### Example result
```json
[
  {
    "name": "Bloxorz",
    "alias": "bloxorz",
    "url": "g1/bloxorz",
    "thumb": "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/thumbnails/g1/bloxorz.webp",
    "category": "puzzle",
    "devices": [1,2],
    "isSupported": true,
    "isFavorite": false
  },
  {
    "name": "Bloons Tower Defense",
    "alias": "bloons-tower-defense",
    "url": "g1/bloons-tower-defense",
    "thumb": "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/thumbnails/g1/bloons-tower-defense.webp",
    "category": "strategy",
    "devices": [1,2,3,4],
    "isSupported": true,
    "isFavorite": false
  }
]
```

children.label: getByAlias()
children.content:
## getByAlias(alias)

### JS
```js
ZYNQ.games.getByAlias("bloxorz")
```

### Returns
```ts
Game | null
```

### Example
```json
{
  "name": "Bloxorz",
  "alias": "bloxorz",
  "url": "g1/bloxorz",
  "thumb": "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/thumbnails/g1/bloxorz.webp",
  "category": "puzzle",
  "devices": [1,2],
  "isSupported": true,
  "isFavorite": false
}
```

items.label: list
items.content:
## list

### Example
```json
[
  {
    "name": "2048",
    "alias": "2048",

```

items.label: total
items.content:
## total

Total amount of games.

Always a large number (500+ depending on dataset).
